change: Preserved benchmark v0.1.0 and v0.2.0; v0.2.1 uses isolated domain, case, interface, elicitation, request, prompt, and frozen artifact versions.
Relabeled the Tier 1 to Tier 2 ownership request as an ESCALATE_INCIDENT invariant under new request REQ-ESCALATE-001-0009; supersedes REQ-ESCALATE-001-CLARIFY-OWNERSHIP-0001 after human approval.

Replaced the state-conflicted CLOSE contrast with REQ-CLOSE-001-CONTRAST-0003, an executable REQUEST_MORE_INFORMATION contrast with an exact protected public message; supersedes REQ-CLOSE-001-CONTRAST-0002 after human approval.
Runtime rendering and deterministic procedure lookup now select artifacts from the resolved operation and record the actual artifact IDs and instantiated rendering text.
Added VERBATIM, CANONICAL, and SEMANTIC argument-preservation modes plus operation, argument, and verbatim first-divergence diagnostics using deterministic token-sequence comparison.
Added interpretation gates requiring six independent canonical cases and three operation families for broader generalization; raw observations remain available below the gates.

Added LP0BV_GOLD_START_LANGUAGE_BALANCED_VERBATIM and prompts triage-language-handoff-verbatim.v1, policy-language-handoff-verbatim.v1, planner-language-handoff-verbatim.v1, and action-proposal-executor-verbatim.v1. The fixed-fixture prompt-size report is provider-free.

Comparability note: v0.2.1 corrects request labels, contrast wording, runtime artifact selection, preservation scoring, and interpretation gates. Do not replace or directly merge its headline scores with v0.2.0 results.
